headline: AES Announces Expiration of Consent Solicitation for its 2032 Notes and Amendment and Extension of Consent Solicitations for its 2028 Notes, 2030 Notes and 2031 Notes
summary: The AES Corporation (the "Company" or "AES") (NYSE: AES) today announced that it has received the requisite consents from registered holders of its 5.800% Senior Notes due 2032 (the "2032 Notes") to the indenture its governing the 2032 Notes pursuant to the Company's previously announced solicitation of consents (the "2032 Notes Consent Solicitation") from registered holders of its 5.800% Senior Notes due 2032 (the "2032 Notes").

raw.headline: AES Announces Expiration of Consent Solicitation for its 2032 Notes and Amendment and Extension of Consent Solicitations for its 2028 Notes, 2030 Notes and 2031 Notes

headline: DPL LLC Announces Amendments to and Further Extension of Consent Solicitation
summary: DPL LLC (f/k/a DPL Inc.) ("DPL") today announced that it is amending and extending its previously announced solicitation of consents (the "Consent Solicitation") from registered holders (the "Holders") of its 4.35% Senior Notes due 2029 (the "Notes") to adopt certain proposed amendments (the "Proposed Amendments") to the indenture governing the Notes, as further described below.
